Dialog.name: Item_003
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A formal, navy blue shirt to pair with a suit.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_004
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sleeveless, red vest designed for ease of movement.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_005
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A frilled blouse made with high-end materials.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_006
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An aqua blue shirt that keeps the wearer's neck warm.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_007
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Aigis. Fit to cover a mechanical body.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_008
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A hooded, zip-up sweatshirt well-suited for any season.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_009
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Basic dog clothes with a simple design.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A long, thick coat for staying warm even in the dead of winter.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A lightweight protector. Keeps the chest well-[n]guarded.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A comfortable suit made of soft material.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A durable shirt made from bulletproof material.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A practical shirt optimized for field combat.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_010
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A traditional martial arts uniform. Permitted only to masters.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_011
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A soft overcoat that gently envelops the body.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_012
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sturdy metal armor with some decent heft.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_013
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A remarkably versatile apron fit for anything, from cooking to combat.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_014
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A durable sash made of tiger hide. Softens the force of blows.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_015
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A bulletproof vest that is difficult to penetrate.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_016
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor that enables survival of a single instakill attack with 1 HP.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_017
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A robe covered in sutras. Said to confer holy power upon the wearer.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_018
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A vest that resists Fire damage for 3 turns at the start of battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_019
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Knickers worn by manly heroes of the past. Instills boldness.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_01A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A cloak made of special fabric. Imbued with the essence of fallen tears.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_01B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A robe fashioned with sorcery that conjures up an invisible shield.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_01C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Wards off disaster. Medium chance to counter physical attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_01D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A haori patterned with rivulets of blood. Harbors an unsettling power.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_01F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Traditional men's summer clothing, but with cutting-[n]edge camouflage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_020
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A leopard-print dress shirt evoking plaintive lamentations.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_021
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Victory-vying garment that temporarily raises the wearer's critical rate.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_022
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A leather jacket that lets the wearer survive death with 1 HP once per battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_023
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A resplendent piece of armor adorned with beautiful decorations.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_024
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A suit made of resilient material. High chance to counter physical attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_025
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A bra with several spikes attached. Raises Attack at the start of battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_026
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A vest woven of cloth as black as the pitiless depths.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_027
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Extremely sturdy armor said to have been made from OOPArts.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_028
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sacred coat with an ornate rose motif.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_029
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A bulky suit that amplifies one's strength.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_02B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A holy robe blessed by a pope.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_02C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor that withstands attacks well. Some say it will last an eternity.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_02D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A savior's armor. Restores all HP upon death once per battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_02E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor inscribed with engravings that protect the wearer from magic.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_02F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A vest that kindles nostalgia with its 8-bit design.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_030
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A shirt for bodybuilders. The wearer becomes unfazed by temptation.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_031
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fills the wearer with a burning passion no chill can extinguish.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_032
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A letterman jacket for baseball legends. Junpei likes to wear it.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_033
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A jacket so full of holes, anyone willing to wear it fears nothing.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_034
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A robe yellowed with age. Radiates mysterious power.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_035
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Holy armor worn by angels in battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_036
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sturdy vest that holds up to all manner of destructive forces.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_037
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A cape that captures the imagination of children. Amada loves it.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_038
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Special fibers keep the wearer insulated from the cold. Perfect for Sanada.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_039
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor worn by the water god. Highly resistant to flames.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A heavy-duty vest made to be impenetrable.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An odd-looking robe that a wizard might wear.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Heavy armor that can withstand devastating blows.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A brilliant, blood-red cape. Gracefully leads the bull astray.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Lingerie popular among women. Restores a tiny bit of SP each turn.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Heavy armor that is difficult to mar with a blade.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_040
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A graceful scarf, always billowing in the wind. Fitting for Mitsuru.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_041
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A parka made of fire-resistant tanned leather.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_042
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Aigis. Fully covers and protects the torso.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_043
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Aigis. A lightweight vest for improved mobility.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_044
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Aigis. Made of firm steel.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_045
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Aigis. Imbued with the essence of fallen tears.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_046
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Aigis. The steel surface area has been expanded.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_047
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Aigis. Harbors unsettling power, evoking rivulets of blood.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_048
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Enhanced armor for Aigis. Simple but robust.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_049
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Enhanced armor for Aigis. Plaintive lamentations dwell within.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_04A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Enhanced armor for Aigis. Made by attaching smaller armor plates together.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_04B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Special armor for Aigis. Its matte finish is as black as the pitiless depths.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_04C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Enhanced armor for Aigis. Made of cemented carbide.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_04D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sacred armor for Aigis with an ornate rose motif.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_04E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Specialized armor for Aigis. Nullifies all status ailments.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_050
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Enhanced armor for Aigis. Covers the entire body in hard steel.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_051
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Special armor for Aigis, yellowed with age. Emits a mysterious power.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_052
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Prototype armor for Aigis. Discontinued after its pilot phase.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_053
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A dog suit that restores 1 HP upon death once per battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_054
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A dog suit with slightly increased durability.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_055
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A special leather dog suit. Imbued with the essence of fallen tears.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_056
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A dog suit made of metal. Fairly heavy, but very durable.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_057
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A dog suit that harbors unsettling power, evoking rivulets of blood.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_058
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A dog suit made of titanium. Strong, yet light.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_059
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A leopard-print dog suit. Plaintive lamentations dwell within.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A stylish dog suit with a cross design on it.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A dog suit made of cloth as black as the pitiless depths.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A mechanized dog suit that temporarily raises Attack and critical rate.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sharp-looking dog suit that's been dyed black.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sacred dog suit with an ornate rose motif.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An enigmatic dog suit that emits a mysterious light.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_060
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A glowing dog suit that shines through even the darkest of nights.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_061
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A dog suit yellowed with age. Radiates mysterious power.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_062
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A starry dog suit. Raises Attack when on the receiving end of a Shift.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_063
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A dog suit enhanced to the limit. Restores HP and SP each turn.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_074
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The haori of choice for masterful samurai.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_075
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A pretty, pink coat made of sturdy materials.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_076
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A tough vest that is somewhat bulletproof.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_078
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Work clothes that resist Wind damage for 3 turns at the start of battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_079
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A beautiful cloak said to ward off disease.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_07A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Winter-ready black tights. Quickly recover from status ailments.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_07B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor worn by a fallen aristocrat. Nullifies mental ailments.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_07C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A shining, yellow dress that stems the flow of electricity.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_07D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Comfy clothing featuring a cute mascot for {f 4 2}.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_07E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A warm, stylish dress. A perfect fit for Yukari.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_096
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Heavy armor for Aigis. Medium chance to Repel physical attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_097
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Artistic armor for Aigis. Inspired by a legendary hero.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_098
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ultra-durable armor for Aigis. Boasts consummate resilience.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_099
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Flanked equipment for Aigis. Enhances combat features.[n]

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Metis. Inlaid with mother of pearl.[n]

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Metis. Made with specialty fibers.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0A3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Metis. Fashioned after knightly garb.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0A4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Metis. Imbued with the essence of fallen tears.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0A5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Metis. The product of fine craftsmanship.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0A6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Metis. Harbors unsettling power, evoking rivulets of blood.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0A7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Metis. Made of divine scales.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0A8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Metis, resistant to blades. Reminiscent of a legendary warrior.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0A9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Metis. Said to contain the life force of a god.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0AA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Metis. Plaintive lamentations dwell within.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0AB
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Metis. Composed of precious metals, high in defense.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0AC
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fine armor for Metis. Layers of lacquer provide great insulation.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0AD
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Special armor for Metis. Its matte finish is as black as the pitiless depths.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0AE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Metis. Made of special material that is highly durable and rigid.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0AF
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Metis. So wicked that it keeps other evils at bay.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0B0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Lightweight armor for Metis. Minimizes load to support high demands.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0B1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Metis. Electronically repels some physical attacks.[n]

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Armor for Metis. Houses the vigor of a great conqueror.[n]
